name: Cherry Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 to 1 1/4 cups C and H Granulated Sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9-inch pie pan with pastry; refrigerate until ready to use.
2. In a large bowl, sprinkle cherries with lemon juice.
3. Mix sugar, flour, salt and spices in a separate bowl.
4. Add the spice mixture to the cherries and mix gently but thoroughly.
5. Pour the cherry mixture into the unbaked pastry crust.
6. Dot the top with butter.
7. Place the top crust on the pie; seal and crimp the edges.
8. Cut slits in the dough to allow steam to escape.
9. Bake at 400°F for 35 to 40 minutes, or until nicely browned.
10. Cool.
Note: With canned cherries, add 1/4 teaspoon red food coloring along with lemon juice.
FOR BERRY PIE – Follow the recipe above except use blueberries, raspberries, blackberries, or other berries instead of cherries. Adjust the amount of sugar to your taste and the sweetness of the fruit.
